Fun



hfhd

The shameless plagiarism is strong with this one. They don't even deny it over on the steam forums. (Gunfire and Apex assets, not just 'mechanical inspiration')

But it's a shame! They're obviously talented. The free roguelike mode is polished to a different league than most free Quest titles and has all the agents you'll be spending currency on if you move on to the multiplayer.

Meta really does not do this game justice leaving it in the obscurity of the meta store for people to stumble upon. Really, this game has some of the best gun designs I've seen in any VR game, and I mean that in the sense that they are so creative and soulful you can tell a lot of heart was put into this game. If this game had more players, I'm willing to bet it'd be a million times better than population one which is why this game needs to be brought back from the dead. The adventure mode is engaging and this game (unlike Population One) allows you to progress far enough within a few weeks to be able to claim cosmetics FOR FREE! Isn't that crazy? It's a game filled with soul that doesn't gouge your wallet for every last cent, it's perfectly balanced, charming, and it's one of the funnest games I've played on VR. Give it a try.
Huge Apex Legends knock off.

this game is so good and there are no glitches that I hace found in this game I wish that kids that only playa gtag could vive this game the chance that it desereves. I used to play population 1 when I wanted to playa vr battle royal but now I just play this and I hope more people play this game its know son a special place in my heart as the top battle royal game.
It has minimal lag and no glitches to abuse to always win every match!!! I definitely think this should be in the top 3 lines not 5 searches away. Also a great variety of guns and skins for them!!!

reviews.review_title: This is a AAA game. biggest potential!
reviews.review_description:
I’m pretty critical of games especially in vr where so many games are lacking, but this game OVERdelivers in literally every area. The grappling hook movements, the variety of awesome guns that make you really want to use all of them, and the completely finished and fleshed out game modes. 

I don’t know what I was expecting with this game but it overdelivered so hard. I hope I see the playerbase increase to what this game deserves!

reviews.review_title: Most slept on battle royale of the VR 🌎
reviews.review_description: If only more people knew this game existed. This game has been the highlight of VR battle royal for me.  It’s well put together, lacks glitching and issues I’ve ran into in some other games, and the fun is through the roof. It also has a great, growing competitive community ready to achieve heights we’ve seen with similar console games like Apex Legends and Fortnite. The potential this game has to be one of the best of the intro to VR gaming era is pretty high I’d say.
lowkey fun tho

reviews.review_title: Worst Vr shooter on the market
reviews.review_description: This game is way to laggy and has awful shooting mechanics

Don't play this if you're not automatically the best player in the game. Almost every player in this game is rude. I think it could really be a good game if everyone was helpful. I'll just stick to population one.

If your looking for a game where you're not needless asked to spend money. Look elsewhere. I downloaded this game for the adventure mode. It's locked to solo unless you spend money which I don't mind. What I do mind is locking progress at level 30 and telling you to spend money to upgrade further. If you're looking to spend time in adventure mode, save your time and find a different game.

developer_response.body: Hi.We are very sorry for the unpleasant experience you have. We hope you can understand our difficulties. We have invested a lot of money and effort in making Rampage Agents. We have opened the first 30 levels of the single-player adventure and the battle royale mode for free. So that players can pay for the adventure mode based on their love for the game. Currently, the payment is only $9.99, and it will be even cheaper if you buy the bundle. We need to make a living and we also need to have a proper income to continue to update and optimize Rampage Agents.

reviews.review_description: It said it had teleport but the teleport magically completely stopped working. Multiple players in the game were continuously saying really perverted disgusting things about s*x acts TO A young CHILD in the game and there was no way to report, or kick, or mute them. Then when we asked them to stop, the child then joined them in talking about their body parts and s*x acts, this is dangeous. We left because it made us sick to hear with no way to stop it. Multiple things in the game were spelled wrong like the game is still in beta. The game was really confusing and no one could figure out what to do. There was no character customization so the characters were all identical and the name didn’t always show so I kept shooting the wrong people and couldn’t find my friend because she looked like everyone. I don’t think I’ve played a worse game :/

developer_response.body:
Hi.
We are very sorry that the game we made brought you a bad experience.

1. About the teleportation function: For the fairness of competition, the teleportation function can only be used in the adventure mode (players can play the single-player adventure for free), and the battle royale mode does not support the teleportation function. You can see the relevant instructions in the settings interface.
2. The game currently supports the official built-in report function. You only need to quickly press the menu key (the key with the meta icon) 5 times, and the report page will pop up. You can fill in their names on this page. The behavior you mentioned is also what we hate. Once there is relevant information, we will definitely deal with it.
3. At present, the game can turn off the voice through the settings interface, but it is not possible to mute or kick a player. We will optimize it in subsequent versions.
4. We are very sorry about the spelling errors. Can you tell us where you found it? Since English is not our native language, we need your help.
5. There are currently five characters in the game, each with its own image and skills. In the shooting range in the preparation space, you can see the names of all players. In the battle field in the preparation space, you will not see the names of all players, including teammates. However, in the game, you can only see the names of teammates, and the names of enemies are not displayed. (There is a special case. Barry has an illusion skill. The illusion released by teammates also has no name, but the illusion seen by teammates will have a special bubble)

You are welcome to give us suggestions. If you have any additions, you can join our Discord (you can find the Discord link from the most liked comments).

reviews.review_description: The weapons are my favorite part about this game. Whether you want to shoot bubbles or lasers, every gun feels fresh and unique. The battle royale mode is fun but needs some more polish. Adventure mode is where the game really shines. Yes, you gotta pay for multi-player co-op and harder difficulties, but it's really worth it, IMHO. Every run-through on adventure is different, and it's actually pretty challenging. Unlocking the harder difficulties and upgrading my characters is my second favorite part.

developer_response.body:
Hi.
Thank you very much for liking Rampage Agents. We will continue to add new content to the adventure mode. I believe that with more and more players joining and more content, the battle royale mode will become more and more fun!

reviews.review_description: This is a peak VR experience. Hard work and effort shines perfectly through every polishing and defining detail. The developer’s delivered an experience we didn’t know we needed. Addicting, exhilarating, perfect. My favorite game in VR.

reviews.review_description:
This is easily the best VR game I've ever played. Let's start off with the battle Royale, the battle royale mode has enough guns to feel different every time, also with the mechanics of grappling and how big and beautiful the map is you could easily play for hours and not get bored. It truly feels like THE battle royale of VR.

Now let's get to adventure mode
♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ this mode is some of the most fun I've ever had in VR. You and your friends go through a dungeon crawler that feels like a whole different game. This mode feels like what Overwatch 2 promised with adventure mode but done right. The dungeons are beautiful, there's different paths for you and your friends to explore, the bosses present a huge challenge and literally take your full focus which allows you to get fully invested in the game. And even after all of that once you leave there is a WHOLE SKILL TREE that you can level up for everytime you play adventure mode. This mode has gotten me and my friends genuinely hooked on this game.

and finally, the skins

I'll start off saying all of the models for guns and characters are amazing, they're perfectly well made and all have their own custom charm to each one. Every single skin in the game feels lovingly made and amazing. You can get almost all of them without even spending actual money on in game purchases! The skins system feels like if Overwatch's skin system was done right.

Overall I literally have 0 complaints. The devs I've met have been some of the best people and every single thing about this game makes it outshine the rest of my VR library

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description:
Good Things:
Rampage Agents is a very fun battle royale game similar to Apex Legends. I very much enjoyed playing it with my friends and thought it had some very unique things that set it aside from other vr games like it. The main one being it's weapons. Rampage Agents has a large amount of creative weapons that I really like! And, everything has a lot of customization! Another thing its characters. Even though it doesn't have many as of now, it adds a nice twist to the game as each character has their own unique skill (you can customize these as well!). The adventure mode is also very fun. It's feels like a whole new game! You're definitely getting a lot of bang for your buck!

Things That Need Improvement:
The biggest thing that Rampage Agents needs right now is... players! Currently there aren't many players which of course the developers can't control. But If more people get the game, it will lead to a less repetitive experience (in battle royale mode). So if you get the game and are bored from the bots, try to think about what it will be like with an active player base! There's not much else I have to say that needs improvement, I do think there could be some tweaks to weapon handling, the UI on your screen during matches, and the walking/running speed but other than that, I was very much impressed by Rampage Agents! Especially for a new release! Keep up the great work!

developer_response.body:
Hi, SuperTrooper. Thank you very much for giving us such a high rating.

We will update more agent characters in the future to make the gameplay of the game richer.

Based on your and other players' suggestions, we have optimized the player transition HUD and added crouching/running/jumping to the game.

Regarding weapon operations, do you hope to have operations similar to changing magazines and pulling bolts?

At present, the battle royale mode in the game is free, and the adventure mode provides a single-player trial. I hope you can invite more friends to join in.

If you have any suggestions, please feel free to let us know. This is very important to us.

reviews.review_title: Hell of a lot of fun
reviews.review_description: If you have ever liked apex, I would recommend this game. It is like apex where you have shield pots and health syringes but makes it a lot more immersive where you have to actually administer them. Though with the fact that it just came out not too long ago it is hard to find players in battle royale lobbies. this is not that much of an issue really, as it just came out like I said, but I hope to see a larger player base in the future. Even then the adventure mode is fun and adds a different aspect that I really enjoyed. Overall, I think this game is great all ready and has a good chance of gaining a lot of popularity.

reviews.review_description:
Amazing game just needs more players!





Underrated game, on VR all you have to do is make a rip-off gorilla tag game and your game blows up.

Please mark this post as helpful and use my Agent ID (17148023) as your recruiter. As your recruiter, we both receive rewards as you level up.  Thank you!

This game is REALLY good. This is going to be the next hot game everyone is talking about. Let me tell you why!

Let's talk about Adventure mode first.
This is a first person shooter with RPG elements. You play solo or coop with up to 3 of your friends to progress through themed maps. There are several types of enemies and bosses.  The boss battles are large and epic as well!  As you play, you gain cores that can be used to upgrade a talent tree. Talents do things that help you survive, do more damage, or increase utility. There are four difficulty levels to challenge you, but you're going to need your talent tree upgraded before you'll even think about winning. This is certainly easier with friends. You'll progress through the level getting player and gun upgrades until you feel ready to take on the final boss of each mission. There are secret rooms that are optional and help you in the cause.

Now about Battle Royale.
You can play against squads of 3 players. If there are not enough players, you'll also play against some bots. The bots aren't very good, just like any other AI bot in a FPS.

Characters
Currently, you can choose from 4 characters to play. Each character has its own unique ability (elemental DMG mine, shield, knives, invisibility). I believe more characters are coming.

But wait... There's more!
There are a lot of different, unique guns for a variety of close to long range combat.
There are consumables to restore shields and health.
There are grenades and door breaches.
There are gun and player upgrades you can pickup to customize your play in both adventure and battle Royale.
You can crouch and jump, but you cannot climb. Instead of a climb, you get a grappling hook that has a few charges and a recharge cooldown. It helps you get around the battle field. Jump, grapple, air snipe is more satisfying than a 360 no scope!
You can earn skins for your players and your guns. If you wish, you can also purchase skins. The skins are really cool looking!

I highly recommend getting this game for you and your friends. The Adventure mode alone is worth the price. Battle Royale is such a great bonus.

If you buy this game, please use my Agent ID to label me as your recruiter (you get in game items too) and use it to look for me in the game!
To add me as your recruiter, go to the games main menu screen. Click the left hand menu button and select recruitment. Enter Agent ID 17148023 and confirm it's for me, Salty Dadda.
To add me as your friend, use the Friend panel on the right hand side and search for Agent ID 17148023.

See you on the battlefield!

Don't forget to mark this post as helpful.  Thanks so much!

reviews.review_title: Pleasantly surprised how fun this is!
reviews.review_description: I wasn’t sure what to expect. There’s a lot of battle royal type games out there but I was quite surprised starting from my very first match. There’s 4 main characters with multiple skins and a ton of different weapons. Many of similar types of games have multiple different types of weapons but they all essentially feel the same. The weapons here not only look different, they feel different and they’re all upgradable. You can also level up different types of attributes for your characters and these upgrades are permanent. The multiplayer matches can be intense and even the single player mode is enjoyable just to grind out points to upgrade your characters. Overall, I think this is a great addition to my library. I think you’ll like it too!

reviews.review_description:
Congratulations on the game overall – it's fantastic! As a Gunfire Reborn fan, you've done an incredible job with the adventure mode. 

Four friends, including myself, have supported you by purchasing it, and we're eagerly looking forward to seeing more! I know the VR market is tough, but don't give up – you have a gem in your hands. 

The gameplay is excellent, offering a smooth and enjoyable experience. The challenges are well-crafted, adding a satisfying level of difficulty. On the Quest 2, the graphics are quite impressive.

Looking forward to the future, adding more perks for wild combinations would be great, along with introducing new enemy types. 

Also, it would be fantastic to see some imaginative additions to keep things fresh and exciting!

Congratulations to the entire team!


-----------------


¡Felicitaciones por el juego! ¡Realmente es excepcional! Como un devoto fan de Gunfire Reborn, debo elogiarlos por el trabajo excepcional realizado con el modo aventura.

Yo, junto con cuatro de mis amigos, hemos apoyado entusiastamente sus esfuerzos realizando compras, y estamos genuinamente emocionados por lo que está por venir. Entiendo los desafíos en el mercado de la realidad virtual, pero por favor, perseveren: su juego es una verdadera joya.

La jugabilidad es excelente, proporcionando una experiencia fluida y placentera. Los desafíos están meticulosamente diseñados, agregando un nivel gratificante de dificultad a la mezcla. En el Quest 2, los gráficos son innegablemente impresionantes.

Mirando hacia el futuro, la adición de más beneficios para combinaciones sorprendentes sería una mejora bienvenida, y la introducción de nuevos tipos de enemigos enriquecería aún más la experiencia de juego. ¡También sería fantástico ver adiciones imaginativas para mantener las cosas frescas y emocionantes!
